inputs.fcf_source: Blended best: 75% Marvin floor $1.38 / 25% Rosen partial normalization ~$1.55 [Assumption]
inputs.normalization_note: Primary metric = blended_best; marvin_floor $1.38 retained for stress

bear.notes: Revenue erosion + refinancing stress; EWSR savings delayed

base.notes: Blended best path (75% Marvin filings / 25% Rosen-approved catalyst framing)

bull.notes: Rosen-approved: Idorsia Phase III success + mix shift; 12.3% sensitivity path

stance_proposal.override_reason: Leveraged balance sheet and unproven post-portfolio moat cap stance despite partial dhando on cash yield

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Intangibles marked; equity low vs debt not hidden-asset pattern

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Eye Care and complex brands in segment mix; 10-K segment note

option_scan.question: Backlog not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Generic pharma revenue recognized on shipment

option_scan.question: Private / illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Biocon Biologics collaboration stake post-2022 biosimilars contribution (10-K definitions)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: FY2025 divestiture gains in other income; excluded from normalized owner cash
option_scan.base_terminal_rationale: One-time portfolio sales not in 10-year run rate

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Biosimilar pipeline economics flow through Generics segment over time

option_scan.question: Idorsia Phase III assets (selatogrel, cenerimod)?
option_scan.evidence: Global R&D collaboration; exclusive rights; Phase III per DEF 14A_20241025 and 10-K
option_scan.base_terminal_rationale: Not in normalized owner cash; catalyst overlay only until readouts and approval path clear

marvin_floor.notes: FY2025 OCF minus capex assumption; ex divestiture gains

external.source: David Rosen / Rubric Capital — Sohn Digging Deeper panel
external.notes: 7x cash-yield framing + Phase III catalyst; 12-month double thesis maps to bull sensitivity, not literal base

blended_best.notes: Human approved blend 2026-06-02; speaker double-in-12mo is catalyst footnote only

paths.label: Marvin floor (filings)
paths.weight_why: FY2025 OCF minus capex haircut; stance stress floor.

paths.label: Rosen (approved) — bull / catalyst path
paths.weight_why: Human approved 2026-06-02; 25% weight per external_view_blend (no literal 10yr double).
weight_falsifiers: Phase III readouts fail or delay beyond 12 months

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: 75/25 Marvin/Rosen blend on owner cash; Rosen 12mo double is catalyst footnote only
